notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Will Smith out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: CJ Abrams GIDP
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Brady House out at 2nd. CJ Abrams out at 1st.
